pilot_config.note: Full-scale plan with pilot checkpoints. Each task has a pilot pass_criteria evaluated at N=100 before committing to full-scale N=5473/10187.

pilot_phases.name: FM2 Verification Pilot

tasks.pilot_purpose: Verify Kendall tau and Spearman rho are computable on raw attribution scores; confirm continuous metrics CAN detect differences between standard and contrastive scoring even at small N
tasks.pass_criteria: Kendall tau computable for all method-task pairs; at least one method shows Kendall tau difference > 0.01 between standard and contrastive (confirms metric sensitivity)
tasks.fail_action: If Kendall tau identical for all pairs: check that raw scores (not ranks) are used; verify contrastive subtraction changes score magnitudes. If metric computation errors: debug scipy.stats.kendalltau call.

tasks.pilot_purpose: Validate contamination injection protocol at small scale; confirm injection degrades performance and correction recovers it
tasks.pass_criteria: At alpha=1.0: contaminated performance drops by >= 5pp; contrastive correction recovers >= 80% of alpha=0; Kendall tau shows monotonic degradation with alpha
tasks.fail_action: If injection has no effect: alpha values may be too small relative to score variance; increase alpha range. If correction fails: check mean computation correctness.

tasks.pilot_purpose: Verify ANOVA computation is correct with nonzero inputs
tasks.fail_action: If ANOVA fails: check that continuous metrics provide nonzero FM2 main effect. If FM2 main effect still zero at pilot: ANOVA is degenerate; report and proceed to full scale.

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: Continuous metrics show nonzero FM2 effect; contamination injection protocol works
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: If continuous metrics still show zero FM2 effect at pilot: proceed to full scale anyway (N=100 may lack statistical power). If injection protocol fails mechanically: debug before full scale.

pilot_phases.name: FM1 Diagnostic Pilot

tasks.pilot_purpose: Run eigenspectrum at N=500 only (smallest new N) to verify Lanczos convergence and scaling trend from N=100 (already done in iter_001)
tasks.pass_criteria: Lanczos converges at N=500; r_eff(95%) for full-model gradients remains < 100; representation eigenspectrum stable
tasks.fail_action: If Lanczos fails at N=500: reduce to top-200 eigenvalues; increase max iterations. If OOM: use gradient accumulation for covariance estimation.

tasks.pilot_purpose: Run TRAK at k in {128, 512, 2048} only (3 checkpoints) at N=100 to verify consistency with iter_001 results
tasks.pass_criteria: Results consistent with iter_001 pilot (within 5pp); saturation trend visible
tasks.fail_action: If inconsistent with iter_001: check random seed, TRAK library version. If worse: may indicate code regression.

tasks.pilot_purpose: Run RepSim PCA sweep at k in {64, 256, 1024, 2048} at N=100 to verify consistency
tasks.pass_criteria: Results consistent with iter_001; saturation at k=64 confirmed
tasks.fail_action: If regression: check PCA implementation and cached representations.

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: Eigenspectrum scales correctly; TRAK and RepSim dim sweeps reproduce pilot trends
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: If eigenspectrum fails: fall back to simpler spectral analysis (e.g., top-100 eigenvalues via power iteration). If dim sweeps regress: debug code changes.

pilot_phases.name: Retrieval Baseline Pilot

tasks.pilot_purpose: Download Contriever and GTR-T5; verify encoding pipeline works; get directional comparison with RepSim at N=100
tasks.pass_criteria: Both models load and encode text; cosine similarity scores produced; at least one shows > 5pp gap below RepSim on >= 1 task
tasks.fail_action: If model download fails: check HuggingFace access. If encoding OOM: reduce batch size. If retrieval matches RepSim at N=100: this is expected (small N); proceed to full scale.

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: Retrieval pipeline functional; directional results available
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: If both retrieval models fail to load: use only BM25 as retrieval baseline.

pilot_phases.name: Mechanism Suite Pilot

tasks.pilot_purpose: Verify last-layer-only TRAK and cosine-normalized TRAK implementations work at N=100
tasks.pass_criteria: All 3 TRAK variants produce valid scores; at least one factor shows >= 3pp gap reduction vs standard TRAK-PCA
tasks.fail_action: If last-layer gradient extraction fails: debug model layer access. If cosine normalization produces NaN: check for zero-norm gradients.

tasks.pilot_purpose: Extract representations at layers {0, 12, 23} only (3 checkpoints) to verify layer access works
tasks.pass_criteria: Representations extracted at all 3 layers; RepSim scores vary by layer
tasks.fail_action: If layer access fails: check transformers hook API. If all layers identical: verify hook placement.

tasks.pilot_purpose: Verify Euclidean distance and dot product RepSim implementations at N=100
tasks.pass_criteria: All 3 similarity functions produce valid scores; results differ by > 1pp on at least 1 task
tasks.fail_action: If identical results: check normalization bug. If Euclidean produces invalid scores: check distance-to-similarity conversion.

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: All mechanism implementations functional; directional results available
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: Debug implementation issues before full scale.

pilot_phases.name: Framework Validation Pilot

tasks.pilot_purpose: Test PCA-reduced whitening at k=64 (N/k=1.56 at N=100, still underdetermined but tests implementation). Verify no NaN/Inf. Compare degradation at k=64 vs full-dimensional whitening (which lost 8-11pp in iter_001).
tasks.pass_criteria: PCA-whitened produces valid scores at k=64; degradation < 8pp (less than full-dimensional whitening); ridge regularization produces valid scores
tasks.fail_action: If NaN: increase ridge lambda. If degradation >= 8pp at k=64: N/k=1.56 too small; full scale N/k=85 should help. Proceed to full scale regardless.

pilot_phases.phase_pass_criteria: PCA-whitened attribution is numerically stable; degradation less severe than full-dimensional
pilot_phases.phase_fail_action: If whitening crashes: debug covariance estimation. If degradation severe: focus on documenting negative result clearly.

overall_pilot_budget.note: Pilots are lightweight verification of new implementations. Most pilot data from iter_001 is reusable. Focus pilot effort on NEW tasks: continuous metrics (P1), retrieval models (P3), gap decomposition variants (P4).
